common_failures.signal: Does not identify the prerequisite role
common_failures.feedback: Name which part of SK-001 is needed before using SK-002.

partial_credit_rules: Names SK-001 but does not explain the dependency gets partial credit.

common_failures.signal: Restates SK-001 without naming the new move
common_failures.feedback: Separate the old prerequisite from the new operation.

partial_credit_rules: States the new move but weakly contrasts it with SK-001 gets partial credit.

common_failures.signal: Cannot locate where SK-001 stops being sufficient
common_failures.feedback: Point to the exact step where the prerequisite no longer solves the task.

partial_credit_rules: Locates the failed step without a correct repair gets partial credit.

common_failures.signal: Treats the nearby invalid case as valid
common_failures.feedback: Explain which condition fails in the nearby case.

partial_credit_rules: Provides cases without a boundary reason gets partial credit.

common_failures.signal: Applies the move but cannot transfer it to the scenario
common_failures.feedback: Tie the scenario feature to the rule before applying it.

partial_credit_rules: Applies SK-002 but omits the limitation gets partial credit.
